title: Reader Outcomes, Publisher Respect, and Product Contract · Type-System Trace: Feed Ts Reader Job
summary: A team proposes a blog aggregator from a feature list but has not defined reader decisions, publisher obligations, freshness, content harm, accessibility, privacy, or mastery evidence. Predict the reader decision, external-unknown boundary, Promise and AbortSignal ownership, PostgreSQL transaction, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the feed ts reader job increment in inclusive feed-reader product contract. Learners progress th…
objectives: Define reader population, decision, task journey, accepted delay, failure harm, and observable learning or research value.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
